nasb.text: Now it will come about that In the last days The mountain of the house of the Lord Will be established as the chief of the mountains, And will be raised above the hills; And all the nations will stream to it.

esv.text: It shall come to pass in the latter days that the mountain of the house of the Lord shall be established as the highest of the mountains, and shall be lifted up above the hills; and all the nations shall flow to it,

cnv.text: 在末後的日子， 耶和華殿的山， 必被堅立，超乎眾山， 必被高舉，過於萬嶺； 萬國都要流歸這山。

ccb.text: 在末后的日子，耶和华殿所在的山必耸立， 高过群山，超过万岭， 万族都要涌向它。

csbs.text: 在末后的日子里， 耶和华殿的山必被确立为群山之首， 必被高举，超过万岭； 万国都要涌向这山。
